top.name: The Grand Design
top.rules_text: For the rest of the fight: whenever you Prepare a glyph it also automatically Prepares on all tiles within 1 of the target. All your glyphs trigger twice.

channel.name: The Grand Design (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Glyphs cost 1 less to prepare

bottom.name: Absolute Territory
bottom.rules_text: Prepare on every tile within 3 of your wizard: your prepared effects. Enemies in this zone deal half damage take 2 damage per tile moved and cannot teleport. Lasts 2 turns.

channel.name: Absolute Territory (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Lasts 3 turns and zone extends to range 4
